SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.tool

Class KBean

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.tool.KBean
Direct Known Subclasses:
AppKBean, BaseKBean, BundleKBean, DockerKBean, EclipseKBean, GitKBean, IntellijKBean, MavenKBean, NativeKBean, ProjectKBean, SetupKBean
public abstract class KBean extends Object
Base class for KBean. User code is not supposed to instantiate KBeans using 'new' but usinng JkRunbase.load(java.lang.Class).

  • Constructor Details

    • KBean

      protected KBean()
      Use init() instead!

      Code added here won't work as expected since public fields (such as those from command-line properties, basedir, and imported KBeans) are not yet initialized.

  • Method Details

    • init

      protected void init()
      This method is called by JeKa engine, right after public fields from command-line or properties have been injected.

      Put your initialization/configuration code here.

    • getBaseDir

      public final Path getBaseDir()
      Returns the base directory of the project. In single projects, base dir = working dir. When working in multi-project (aka multi-module project), the base dir will be the sub-project base directory.

    • getBasePath

      public final Path getBasePath(String relativePath)
      Resolves the given relative path against the base directory of the project.

    • getBaseDirName

      public final String getBaseDirName()
      Returns the name of the folder which stands for the project base directory.

    • getOutputDir

      public final Path getOutputDir()
      Returns the output directory where all the final and intermediate artifacts are generated.

    • getRunbase

      public final JkRunbase getRunbase()
      Returns the JkRunbase where this KBean has been instantiated.

    • load

      public final <T extends KBean> T load(Class<T> beanClass)
      See Also:
      • JkRunbase.load(Class)

    • find

      public final <T extends KBean> Optional<T> find(Class<T> beanClass)
      See Also:
      • JkRunbase.find(Class)

      public String toString()

    • cleanOutput

      public KBean cleanOutput()
